phase1_baseline.note: Carry-forward from research/clean_session_analysis_2026-06-12.md. Signal_bridge data available for S3-S5 only (9 completed trades). S1-S2 (5 completed trades) lack signal_bridge data; dimension values estimated from post-session reports.

phase2_sessions.pnl_note: Zero-trade session. Scanner operated all 360 cycles (09:30–12:30 ET) but rvol < 0.50 across all 27 symbols throughout. low_volume_chop gate blocked all 180 candidate rejections across 35 periodic re-scans. Peak rvol: AVGO 0.472 at ~10:42 ET, never cleared threshold.
phase2_sessions.data_clean_reason: Zero-trade session — no fills to verify, no broker state, clean pre-session checks, clean EOD shutdown. 360 cycles completed without incident.
phase2_sessions.infra_notes: Note: A prior S7 attempt on 2026-06-16 was invalidated due to sandbox VM reboot mid-session (process killed externally at cycle 24 ~09:58 ET, no positions open). That attempt was voided and excluded from evaluation. This 2026-06-17 run is the official Session 7.

phase2_sessions.pnl_note: All three trades resolved. XLE -$4 actual (journal recorded -$6, corrected). PLTR +$24. DIA +$15 (EOD limit expired unfilled 6/15; carried over, resolved via max_hold exit at S7 startup 6/16, broker-confirmed fill $1.95). DIA P&L attributed to S6 per Phase 2 carryover handling despite resolving during S7.
phase2_sessions.data_clean_reason: XLE exit price discrepancy (journal $0.36, actual $0.38, corrected post-session). DIA EOD exit order expired unfilled at broker close, requiring cross-session carryover resolution (resolved 6/16, all fills now confirmed and reconciled).

trades_detail.note: EOD sell limit 1.83 expired unfilled 6/15. Position carried to S7, re-linked via SessionRecovery fix, closed via max_hold rule (true entry time preserved) at S7 startup. Broker-confirmed fill 1.95, pnl=+15. Hold duration 79068s spans S6->S7 boundary.

cumulative.note: Includes Phase 1 baseline (S1-S5) plus Phase 2 S6 and S7. S6: 3 trades (XLE -$4, PLTR +$24, DIA +$15 carryover). S7: 0 trades (low_volume_chop standby all session). Trade totals unchanged from S6.

dimensions.note: Through S6 (17 total trades: 14 P1 + 3 S6). S1-S2 signal_bridge unavailable; quality/age/scanner sourced from post-session reports where possible. S3-S6 have full signal_bridge data. S7 adds 0 trades. All dimension counts reflect 12 trades with quality/DTE/age/scanner data (S3-S5=9 + S6=3; S1-S2=5 excluded from quality/age/scanner due to no signal_bridge).

quality_score.note: S3-S6 (signal_bridge data). 12 completed trades with quality data (9 P1 + 3 S6: XLE q=2, PLTR q=3, DIA q=2). 1 breakeven (SPY S3 excluded from win/loss).

dte.note: S3-S6. 12 completed trades with DTE data. S6 all DTE=3 (June 18 expiry, Thursday due to Juneteenth holiday June 19).

asset_class.note: All 14 trades. ETF/single-stock classification from universe group. S1-S2 assumed ETF from symbol list.

signal_age_minutes.note: S3-S6 (12 completed trades with age data). S6: XLE 37.9min (30-60), PLTR 108.6min (90-120), DIA 73.9min (60-90).

scanner_score.note: S3-S6 (12 completed trades with scanner score data). S6: XLE 67 (60-69), PLTR 55 (50-59), DIA 58 (50-59).

minimum_observations.note: Minimum 3 per bucket before dimension comparisons. Updated after each session.

Q1_orb_vs_vwap.reason: ORB N=3 unchanged (no ORB trades in S6 or S7). VWAP N=14. No additional data from S7 (0 trades). Indeterminate pending ORB data.

Q2_signal_age.reason: 30-60 N=5 (0 wins/5, pnl=-101), 60-90 N=5 (3 wins/5, pnl=-72), 90-120 N=2 (1 win/2, pnl=-36). <30 N=2, >120 N=0. S7 adds no data. No consistent positive age→performance correlation yet; 60-90 shows best win rate but small N.
Q2_signal_age.note: 30-60 bucket now weakest. 60-90 and 90-120 both show wins but 90-120 still below N=3 minimum.

Q3_dte.reason: DTE=0 N=7 (1 win, pnl=-118). DTE=2-3 N=7 (4 wins, pnl=-29). DTE=1 N=1. S7 adds no data. DTE 2-3 now showing stronger win rate vs DTE=0 at equal N, but still early.

Q4_etf_vs_single_stock.reason: Single-stock N=2 (TSLA S5, PLTR S6). ETF N=15. S7 adds no data. Still below N=3 minimum for single-stock.

Q5_quality_scores.reason: Quality=2 N=6 (1 win/6, 17%, pnl=-121), quality=3 N=3 (2 wins/3, 67%, pnl=+28). S7 adds no data. Both above N=3 minimum. Early pattern: quality=3 outperforms quality=2 in win rate. Not yet SUPPORTED (small N, possible confounds from other dimensions).

Q6_scanner_score.reason: Score 50-59 N=6 (3 wins/6, pnl=-102). Score 60-69 N=2 (0 wins, pnl=-8). Score <40 N=3 (0 wins, pnl=-82). S7 adds no data. No bucket with N>=3 showing positive expectancy. 50-59 is the best-performing bucket with 50% win rate but negative expectancy overall.

Q7_fill_path.reason: Recovered N=15 (2 wins, pnl=-280). Direct N=2 (2 wins, pnl=+39). S7 adds no data. Direct fills 2/2 winners but still below N=3 minimum. Pattern promising but insufficient.

note: Phase 2 tracking. S6 complete (XLE -$4, PLTR +$24, DIA +$15 carryover). S7 complete: zero-trade standby session (rvol < 0.50 all session, low_volume_chop gate). 8 sessions remaining to Phase 2 midpoint (S10).
